Pop-Up Collage Maker

Make collages out of pop-up windows, specifying the things to which they link, their sizes, and screen positions!
This toy was designed for 1080p screens.
For an example of what's possible Click Here!

Amount of popups:

Link:

Inject HTML:

All following values are in px:

ScreenX: 0

ScreenY: 0

Width:

Height:
